title: Abuse Queue Review - Daily Moderation Summary
body:
Today's abuse queue review has been completed. Actions taken:

- spam_wave_42: Banned for posting phishing links in multiple channels
- toxic_runner: Banned for repeated targeted harassment against newcomers
- core_maintainer: Report dismissed as false positive (brigading)

3 reports closed. Remaining reports (medium/low severity) will be reviewed in the next cycle.
